title: label is not systematically stored as string in a virtual graph
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE DB.PEST.SUBSTANCES_LANG_TEST (SUBSTANCES_LNG_ID UInt64 NOT NULL, SUBSTANCES_ID UInt64 NOT NULL, SUBSTANCES_LANGUE String NOT NULL, SUBSTANCES_NAME String NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (SUBSTANCES_LNG_ID));
INSERT INTO DB.PEST.SUBSTANCES_LANG_TEST (SUBSTANCES_LNG_ID, SUBSTANCES_ID, SUBSTANCES_LANGUE, SUBSTANCES_NAME) VALUES (1, 101, 'EN', 'Test Substance 1');
INSERT INTO DB.PEST.SUBSTANCES_LANG_TEST (SUBSTANCES_LNG_ID, SUBSTANCES_ID, SUBSTANCES_LANGUE, SUBSTANCES_NAME) VALUES (2, 102, 'FR', 'Substance de Test 2');
SELECT SUBSTANCES_NAME, SUBSTANCES_LANGUE FROM DB.PEST.SUBSTANCES_LANG_TEST WHERE SUBSTANCES_LNG_ID IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE DB.PEST.SUBSTANCES_LANG_TEST UPDATE SUBSTANCES_NAME = NULL WHERE SUBSTANCES_LANGUE = 'EN';
key_bug_features: Inconsistent internal_type for labels in different environments
